name: 3기준선돌파
python_code:
_KVAR_3 = (20)
_KVAR_1 = (40)
_KVAR_0 = (60)
_KVAR_2 = (1.02)
A = ((highest(high, _KVAR_3) + lowest(low, _KVAR_3)) / 2)
A1 = ((highest(high, _KVAR_1) + lowest(low, _KVAR_1)) / 2)
A2 = ((highest(high, _KVAR_0) + lowest(low, _KVAR_0)) / 2)
B = (MAX(A, A1, A2))
B1 = (MIN(A, A1, A2))
cond = (B1 * _KVAR_2 > B) & (df['open'] < B1) & (df['close'] > B) & ((A > A.shift(1)) | (A1 > A1.shift(1)) | (A2 > A2.shift(1)))
